column8: Where you (go) for your next holiday?
column9: I (give) you a lift to work tomorrow if you like.
column10: Do you know that Ann (come) at the end of the week?
column11: – I’m afraid I’m not quite ready. – Never mind. I (wait).
column12: Shop assistant: We have some very nice strawberries. Customer: All right. I (have) a pound.
column13: We (have) a party next Saturday night. You (come)?
column14: Why you (take) the carpets down? You (paint) the walls? – No, I (take) the carpets to the cleaner’s.
column15: There are a lot of mistakes in this document. – All right. I (type) it again.
column16: Leave a note for him on the table and he (see) it when he (come).
column17: He (leave) for London tomorrow night. You (see) him off?
